_meta.description: Disambiguation rules for doc types that frequently confuse with each other across domains.

rules.structureCue: Has routing number, bank logo header, or account ledger layout
rules.reason: Banking domain has specialized extraction for account and transaction structures.

rules.structureCue: Has portfolio positions, market value columns, or securities listings
rules.reason: Finance domain covers investor-style statement structure and metrics.

rules.structureCue: Contains meter readings, kWh usage lines, and tariff blocks
rules.reason: Billing utility schemas are more specific for energy billing fields.

rules.structureCue: Contains service plan speed/data usage and telecom fee breakdown
rules.reason: Billing telecom extraction handles plan-level and line-item service charges.

rules.structureCue: Contains per-line call/text/data usage and roaming fee blocks
rules.reason: Billing mobile schemas include phone-line usage and overage parsing.

rules.structureCue: Contains SKU-level itemization with quantity, unit price, and totals
rules.reason: Billing receipt structures provide stronger item-level extraction contracts.

rules.structureCue: Contains claim number, policy linkage, and adjudication workflow fields
rules.reason: Insurance domain has claim-specific extraction and safety-centric policy handling.

rules.structureCue: Contains coverage limits, exclusions, endorsements, and declarations page
rules.reason: Insurance policy documents require specialized clause-level extraction.

rules.structureCue: Contains invoice number, payment terms, and business line-item tax breakdown
rules.reason: Billing invoice packs include stronger AP/AR extraction fields than generic everyday invoices.

rules.structureCue: Contains taxpayer identifiers, filing period, and tax owed/refund summary
rules.reason: Tax-return schemas encode filing-specific sections and controlled numeric integrity rules.

rules.structureCue: Contains assessment reference, assessed amount, due date, and appeal instructions
rules.reason: Tax assessment notices require tax-domain-specific compliance and date resolution behavior.

rules.structureCue: Contains rental period, unit/property address, and landlord/tenant payment ledger
rules.reason: Housing rent receipts provide tenancy-aware field extraction and section anchors.

rules.structureCue: Contains passport number, issuing country, expiration, and MRZ-style identity fields
rules.reason: Identity passport schemas enforce identity-doc safety and field-level precision.

rules.structureCue: Contains driver license number, issuing authority, class, and validity period
rules.reason: Driver-license specific structure should win over generic everyday identity cues when present.

rules.structureCue: Contains routing number, account number mask, or debit/credit transaction ledger rows
rules.reason: Banking statements have account-ledger structure that should override finance portfolio-style statements.

rules.structureCue: Contains tax authority assessment reference, levy code, or appeal/payment slip details
rules.reason: Tax-domain property tax bills provide stronger compliance-grade tax section semantics.

rules.structureCue: Contains claim number, policy number, insurer adjuster fields, or adjudication status blocks
rules.reason: Insurance claim forms should win when claims workflow fields are present.

rules.structureCue: Contains guidance/forecast narrative with KPI outlook sections and investor-style summary tables
rules.reason: Finance forecast doc types should win when forward-looking KPI narrative is explicit.

rules.structureCue: Contains variance commentary with KPI bridge, outlook, or management action narrative
rules.reason: Finance variance packs should win over accounting variance workpapers when narrative KPI framing exists.
